race_name: L'Etape Greece by Tour de France

top_categories.workout_context: At mile 60 of 87, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
64ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Race-pace efforts that mimic L'Etape Greece by Tour de France's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before April.
5,577ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of L'Etape Greece by Tour de France. Train it until it feels boring.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 87 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.
L'Etape Greece by Tour de France's paved mountain and coastal roads through the forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 87 miles.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 5,577ft of climbing on paved mountain and coastal roads through the does to your power file on race day.
At L'Etape Greece by Tour de France, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 87 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
The aerobic base that lets you ride paved mountain and coastal roads through the at tempo for 87 miles without cracking. No shortcuts.
Tempo is L'Etape Greece by Tour de France's race pace. The wattage you'll hold for 87 miles on paved mountain and coastal roads through the. Train it until it's automatic.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for L'Etape Greece by Tour de France’s 87 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, TT Threshold, and Race Simulation to prepare you for 87 miles of paved mountain and coastal roads through the peloponnese in Sparta, Laconia, Peloponnese, Greece (2026). Location rotates annually within Greece..
